title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: A video explanation of agent harness engineering, positioning it as an evolution from prompt engineering and context engineering. The piece traces the progression from simpler prompt techniques through architectural considerations for agentic systems, emphasizing the need for clarification around harness engineering terminology.
